topic: Missouri Waterfowl Hunting: Zones, Dates, and Reservation Areas

items.markdown:
![Missouri Duck Hunting Guide: 2025-2026 Season Info](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/04282005-1118-0139-0000-db99a06dc6ef:4)
Duck season in Missouri generally runs from `late October through late January` , divided into North, Middle, and South zones to match migration. For the 2025–2026 season, key dates include North Zone (Nov 1–Dec 30), Middle Zone (Nov 1–9, Nov 15–Jan 4), and South Zone (Nov 27–30, Dec 7–Jan 31). Youth seasons begin late October.[[1]](https://www.highpointlandcompany.com/missouri-hunting-seasons-complete-guide/)[[2]](https://www.divebombindustries.com/blogs/news/the-best-show-me-state-duck-hunting-in-missouri-a-guide)[[3]](https://www.eregulations.com/missouri/hunting/hunting-seasons-and-dates)[[4]](https://treasureislandducks.com/guided-missouri-waterfowl-hunts/)[[5]](https://www.ozarkradionews.com/local-news/mdc-announces-2025-migratory-game-bird-and-waterfowl-hunting-seasons)

2025–2026 Missouri Duck Season Dates[[1]](https://huntinglocator.com/blog/missouri-duck-hunting/)

- **North Zone:** Nov. 1 – Dec. 30, 2025.
- **Middle Zone:** Nov. 1 – Nov. 9, 2025, and Nov. 15, 2025 – Jan. 4, 2026.
- **South Zone:** Nov. 27 – Nov. 30, 2025, and Dec. 7, 2025 – Jan. 31, 2026.
- **Youth Zones (All):** Oct. 25–26, 2025 (North/Middle), Nov. 22–23, 2025 (South).[[1]](https://www.eregulations.com/missouri/hunting/hunting-seasons-and-dates)[[2]](https://treasureislandducks.com/guided-missouri-waterfowl-hunts/)

Important Details

- **Daily Limit:** 6 ducks (includes species restrictions, e.g., max 4 mallards, 3 wood ducks).
- **Requirements:** Requires a [Missouri hunting license](https://mdc.mo.gov/hunting-trapping/species/waterfowl/duck-zones), Federal Duck Stamp, Missouri Migratory Bird Hunting Permit , and HIP certification.
- **Hours:** One-half hour before sunrise to sunset.[[1]](https://mdc.mo.gov/hunting-trapping/seasons/ducks-coots-hunting-middle-zone)[[2]](https://treasureislandducks.com/guided-missouri-waterfowl-hunts/)[[3]](https://www.divebombindustries.com/blogs/news/the-best-show-me-state-duck-hunting-in-missouri-a-guide)

For the most up-to-date regulations, check the Missouri Department of Conservation website.[[1]](https://whiteoutoutfitters.com/missouri-spring-snow-goose-hunts-a-unique-waterfowl-adventure)[](https://mdc.mo.gov/hunting-trapping/seasons/ducks-coots-hunting-middle-zone) Ducks and Coots Hunting: Middle Zone | Missouri Department of Conservation The middle zone duck season in Missouri is not open. The season is scheduled as follows: * **November 7, 2026 - December 13, 2026*![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/04282005-1118-0139-0000-db99a06dc6ef:5)

Are ducks unlimited for hunters?

expanded_element.title: DU Position on Hunting | Ducks Unlimited
expanded_element.description: was founded by hunter-conservationists in 1937 and conservation has always been its mission. Ducks Unlimited, Inc. is first and foremost an organization dedicated to conserving wetlands and associated habitats for waterfowl and other wildlife, and the majority of its members are hunters.

items.title: How many mallards can you shoot in Missouri?

expanded_element.title: Duck Hunting Questions - Rogers Goosedown Outfitters
expanded_element.description: See below for the kill limit by duck species: Ducks: Daily limit of 6 with species restrictions below, possession limit of 18. Mallards: 4 (no more than 2 females) Scaup: 3.

items.title: Where do ducks go mid-day?

expanded_element.title: Jump Shoot Ducks at Mid-Day Loafing Areas and Roosting Sites
expanded_element.description: Look for a small body of water like a beaver pond, a flooded-timber area or a calm-water section along a small stream where ducks like to roost. You often can stalk in close in these regions to experience some of the finest duck hunting you'll ever have.
